theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive, authoritative, highly professional.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: For global trade and B2B sourcing, the design needs to evoke immense trust, scale, and premium quality. A cinematic dark mode with gold/amber accents signals 'elite corporate' rather than 'startup tech'. We avoid neon or pure black, favoring deep slate/obsidian to maintain corporate credibility.

headings.description: Used for all headings to provide a modern, sleek, and premium tech-forward corporate feel.

body.description: Clean, geometric sans-serif for high legibility in dense dashboards and forms.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-light to font-medium

rules: Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Never center text by default; prioritize left-alignment for B2B readability.
Overlines/labels must be uppercase, tiny, and widely spaced.
No pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds. Use tinted grays.
Only use Gold/Amber (#D4AF37) for primary CTAs, active states, and key highlights.
Hover state text MUST be explicitly set (e.g., hover:text-white).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24) to emphasize luxury and breathing room.

grids.marketing_pages: Mode A (Bento/Tetris Grid) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Mix spans (col-span-4, col-span-8) to avoid boring symmetry.
grids.dashboard_portal: Mode B (Control Room Grid) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Strict hierarchy, every pixel utilized.

rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Hero sections must use gradient overlays (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/50 to-transparent) instead of flat blankets.

surfaces.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05050A]/70, 1px bottom border border-white/10.
surfaces.cards_marketing: Grid Borders or subtle 1px border-white/5, bg-[#0C0C14], hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all.
surfaces.cards_dashboard: Flat Solid: bg-[#0C0C14], border border-white/10, rounded-xl.
surfaces.modals: Heavy Blur: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#05050A]/80, 1px inner border.

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for Dark Luxury. Dark inputs (bg-[#05050A]), subtle white/10 borders, Amber focus rings.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#F0C852] transition-colors rounded-none or rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none or rounded-sm

components.tables: Shadcn tables for dashboard. Dark headers, subtle border separators, no alternating row colors (too generic).

motion.marketing: Lenis smooth scrolling (momentum). Fade-in-up staggered entrance for bento grids.
motion.interactions: Subtle scales on cards (scale-[1.02]), opacity fades on links.
motion.rules: Disable/reduce motion for prefers-reduced-motion media query.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (use lightweight, crisp stroke widths, 1.5px or 1px).
icons_and_assets.style: Minimalist, strictly functional. No multi-colored illustrations.

hero.description: Container ship sailing at night - Use for main Homepage Hero background.
Empty conference room panoramic city view sunset - Use for About or Services Hero background.

supplier_pages.description: Dark high-tech factory room - Use for Supplier Onboarding/For Suppliers Hero.
Man working on a machine - Use for Supplier features section.

buyer_pages.description: Sleek modern office space - Use for 'For Buyers' page.

categories.description: Cargo ship at sunset - Use for Logistics/Shipping category card.
Train traveling at night - Use for Rail/Inland category card.

trust_signals.description: Brand logo placeholder for Trust Bar (Apply grayscale filter and high contrast).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-buyer', data-testid='supplier-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium, dark-mode B2B corporate site for Elan Exports Consultancy.
Implement pure HTML+Tailwind for marketing layouts (Home, Services, About) using bento/asymmetric grids. Avoid Shadcn container constraints here.
Use Shadcn components for the Dynamic Buyer Portal and Supplier Onboarding Dashboard, heavily restyling them to match the dark luxury palette (#0C0C14 backgrounds, #D4AF37 accents).
Install and use 'framer-motion' for staggered entrance animations and micro-interactions.
Ensure all hero images utilize a dark gradient overlay (e.g., from-black/90 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast (APCA compliant).
Never use placeholder URLs (like placehold.co). Only use the URLs provided in the media_urls section.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements for automated testing.
